question: 1H Spread: Pistons (-2.5)
description:
In the first half of the NBA game between Warriors and Pistons, scheduled for March 20 at 7:30 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Pistons" if the Pistons are winning by 3 or more points at halftime.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Warriors".

The result will be determined based on the score at halftime only.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

events.title: Warriors vs. Pistons
events.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 20 at 7:30PM ET:
If the Warriors win, the market will resolve to "Warriors".
If the Pistons win, the market will resolve to "Pistons".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

eventMetadata.context_description: Detroit Pistons' 75.5% implied probability reflects trader consensus on Golden State Warriors' depleted roster amid a brutal injury wave, with Stephen Curry sidelined by a deep thigh bruise, Jonathan Kuminga out with thigh soreness, and Buddy Hield questionable with an ankle tweak per official reports. Pistons ride a hot streak, winners of four straight behind Cade Cunningham's explosive 29.5 points per game average and top-10 defense clamping opponents to 98 points nightly. Warriors limp in at 1-4 road form, outscored by 12 per 100 possessions without Curry, while Detroit's athletic frontcourt exploits Golden State's thin wing depth in this key Eastern Conference tilt. Upsets remain possible given NBA volatility.

question: Newcastle United FC vs. Sunderland AFC: O/U 10.5 Total Corners
description: In the upcoming Premier League game between Newcastle United FC and Sunderland AFC, scheduled for March 22, 2026 at 8:00 AM ET: This market will resolve to "Over" if there are 11 or more total corners awarded in this game (combining corners for both teams). If the total number of corners is fewer than 11, this market will resolve to "Under". If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50. This market refers only to corners awarded within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time. Corners awarded during extra time or penalty shootouts do not count. The primary resolution source for this market is the official statistics of the event as recognized by the governing body or event organizers. However, if the governing body or event organizers have not published final match statistics within 24 hours after the event's conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead.

events.title: Newcastle United FC vs. Sunderland AFC - Total Corners
events.description: Total corners markets for the Premier League game between Newcastle United FC and Sunderland AFC, scheduled for March 22, 2026 at 8:00 AM ET.

eventMetadata.context_description: Newcastle United's dominant home attacking style at St James' Park drives trader consensus toward higher total corners in this heated Tyne-Wear derby FA Cup clash, with the Magpies averaging 6.2 corners per Premier League match this season compared to Sunderland's 4.8 in the Championship. Recent developments bolster the over case: Newcastle's Alexander Isak is fit after minor injury concerns, fueling their possession-heavy approach (62% average), while Sunderland's defensive vulnerabilities showed in conceding 7 corners during a recent 2-1 loss to Burnley. Historical derbies average 10.5 corners, and both sides' set-piece aggression amid rivalry intensity suggests elevated end-product potential, though Sunderland's counter-threat could temper numbers if they park the bus.

question: Valorant: TYLOO vs Bilibili Gaming (BO5) - China Evolution Series Act 1 Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Valorant Grand final match between TYLOO and Bilibili Gaming in the China Evolution Series Act 1 Playoffs, initially scheduled for March 22 at 5:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "TYLOO" if TYLOO win the match against Bilibili Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Bilibili Gaming" if Bilibili Gaming win the match against TYLOO.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://vlr.gg. However, if https://vlr.gg has not published final results within 2 hours after the event’s conclusion, a consensus of credible reporting may be used instead including video evidence.

Donald Trump is scheduled to participate in a Memphis Safe Task Force Roundtable on March 23, 2026, 1PM ET (https://www.commercialappeal.com/story/news/local/2026/03/17/president-trump-to-visit-memphis-tn/89201228007/). 

This market will resolve to "Yes" if Donald Trump says the listed term during the Memphis Roundtable scheduled for March 23, 2026. Otherwise, the market will resolve to "No".

Plural and possessive forms of the listed term will count toward the resolution of this market regardless of context; however, other forms will NOT count.

Instances where the term is used in a compound word will count regardless of context (e.g., joyful is not a compound word for "joy," however, "killjoy" is a compounding of the words "kill" and "joy").

This market is explicitly about Trump's Memphis Roundtable scheduled for March 23, 2026, 1PM ET. Speeches, events, or comments that occur outside of the named, scheduled event will not qualify toward this market's resolution. If the event contains a Q&A, it will count toward the resolution of this market.

AI-generated audio or video will not count toward this market's resolution.

If this event is definitively cancelled, or otherwise is not aired by March 23, 2026, 11:59 PM ET, "-No Qualifying Event-" will resolve to "Yes" and all other brackets will resolve to "No". 

The resolution source will be video of the events. Only remarks which are broadcast or streamed live will count toward this market's resolution.

eventMetadata.context_description: Trader consensus on Polymarket for Donald Trump's Memphis roundtable remarks tilts toward emphasis on urban crime and economic policies, driven by the city's FBI-reported highest per-capita murder rate among large U.S. metros. question: XRP Up or Down - March 21, 10:30AM-10:45AM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the XRP price at the end of the time range specified in the title is greater than or equal to the price at the beginning of that range. Otherwise, it will resolve to "Down".
The resolution source for this market is information from Chainlink, specifically the XRP/USD data stream available at https://data.chain.link/streams/xrp-usd.
Please note that this market is about the price according to Chainlink data stream XRP/USD, not according to other sources or spot markets.
